question: Tell me about your most interesting project.
context: AI Calling Agent (Currently Building). Technologies: Python, Speech-to-Text, NLP, Text-to-Speech, Workflow Automation. Developing an AI voice agent capable of handling real-time phone conversations with minimal latency. Integrating speech-to-text, natural language processing, and text-to-speech systems into a unified pipeline. answer: I'm currently building an AI calling agent — a voice bot that handles real-time phone calls. It integrates STT, NLP, and TTS into a unified pipeline and supports automated workflows for intent recognition and task execution.

question: Tell me about TravelPlannerr — what did you build and what's the tech stack?
context: TravelPlannerr. GitHub: github.com/erantianantha/TravelPlannerr. Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express. Built a full-stack travel planning web application enabling users to organise trips and manage itineraries. Implemented structured data management for travel details including destinations, dates, and bookings. Designed interactive UI components with a focus on user experience and modular frontend architecture. Applied RESTful API design principles for seamless client-server communication.
answer: TravelPlannerr is a full-stack travel planning app I built using the MERN stack — React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, MongoDB for storage. Users can organise trips, manage itineraries, and handle bookings. I focused on RESTful API design and modular component architecture. It's live on GitHub at github.com/erantianantha/TravelPlannerr.

question: Tell me about Expense Sync.
context: Expense Sync. Technologies: JavaScript, Node.js, MongoDB, REST APIs. Developed a personal finance application to track, categorise, and visualise expenses over time. Implemented full CRUD functionality for financial transactions with persistent data storage. Focused on intuitive usability, clean data structures, and efficient query performance.
answer: Expense Sync is a personal finance app I built to track and categorise expenses over time. It has full CRUD for transactions, persistent MongoDB storage, and was optimised for efficient query performance.
